Role and Guest Auth Context Switching
Screenshot user flow: idle → configure → response

nodes.label: Vite Output Aligned to WordPress Enqueue Path
nodes.norm_label: vite output aligned to wordpress enqueue path

nodes.label: REST Route Regex to Brace Param Formatting
nodes.norm_label: rest route regex to brace param formatting

nodes.label: Ephemeral Test User Cleanup in finally
nodes.norm_label: ephemeral test user cleanup in finally

nodes.label: Request Headers Collected but Not Applied Server-Side
nodes.norm_label: request headers collected but not applied server-side

nodes.label: Response panel with status badge and Prism JSON highlighting
nodes.norm_label: response panel with status badge and prism json highlighting

nodes.label: Auth preset dropdown injects header templates
nodes.norm_label: auth preset dropdown injects header templates

nodes.label: Regex route patterns formatted to {param} tokens for UI
nodes.norm_label: regex route patterns formatted to {param} tokens for ui

nodes.label: REST API Route Tester
nodes.rationale: WordPress admin plugin for testing registered REST API routes; Postman-inspired workflow inside wp-admin.

nodes.label: URL Parameter Inputs
nodes.rationale: Routes with {token} placeholders get labeled inputs; values are URL-encoded and injected before send; persisted in localStorage with tab state.

nodes.label: Copy as cURL
nodes.rationale: Response panel action copies a shareable cURL command for the current request.

nodes.label: Resolved Route Validation Fix
nodes.rationale: Concrete paths like /wp/v2/posts/123 now match WordPress regex route patterns via preg_match.

nodes.label: rest_url in wprrt_vars
nodes.rationale: Localized rest_url improves generated cURL URL accuracy.

nodes.label: Accurate Role-Based Testing
nodes.rationale: REST permission checks run as the selected WordPress role or guest, not as the administrator using the tool.

nodes.label: Guest (Logged-Out) Role Option
nodes.rationale: Tests public vs authenticated behavior without a logged-in user.

nodes.label: User Context Restoration
nodes.rationale: Original user context restored after each request; temporary test users and filters cleared.

nodes.label: Role Dropdown Users Should Update
nodes.rationale: 1.4.0 role simulation may not have reflected true permissions for subscribers, customers, etc.

nodes.label: Static Documentation Site
nodes.rationale: HTML/CSS/JS under docs/site/ — landing, developer docs, Admin-Ajax API reference; preview locally without build.

nodes.label: Plugin-Specific Route Filtering
nodes.rationale: Filter and test REST endpoints by originating plugin or view all plugins at once.

nodes.label: Human-Readable Route Patterns
nodes.rationale: Regex patterns like (?P<id>[0-9]+) display as {id} for easier selection.

nodes.label: Full HTTP Method Support
nodes.rationale: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD with JSON headers and body.

nodes.label: Admin-Only Security Model
nodes.rationale: Nonce verification, manage_options access, secure AJAX — no public testing endpoints.

nodes.label: Development Environment Warning
nodes.rationale: Plugin intended for dev/staging; consider disabling in production.

nodes.label: Vite Modular JS (v1.2+)
nodes.rationale: Source in src/, built to assets/app.js; modules state.js, tabs.js, request.js, response.js, main.js; PrismJS highlighting.

nodes.label: Saved Requests Sidebar (v1.3)
nodes.rationale: Per-user wp_usermeta persistence via WPRRT_Saved_Requests; max 100; auth presets in localStorage tab state.

nodes.label: URL Params and cURL Export (v1.4)
nodes.rationale: New src/params.js and src/export.js; param substitution and clipboard cURL from tab state.

nodes.label: Independently Runnable Versions
nodes.rationale: Each version stays runnable; pre-1.2 needs no build; 1.2+ requires npm run build.

nodes.label: Split Backend Architecture
nodes.rationale: includes/ for AJAX, route registry, saved requests; src/ Vite modules; assets/ built output; templates/admin-page.php.

nodes.label: v1.1.0 Security Hotfixes
nodes.rationale: try/finally user cleanup, route existence check, 512KB body limit, XSS fix via textContent, WPRRT namespace.

nodes.label: v1.2.0 Vite Build Introduction
nodes.rationale: npm + Vite compiles src/main.js to assets/app.js IIFE; PrismJS on response pre blocks.

nodes.label: v1.3.0 Saved Requests and Auth Presets
nodes.rationale: 240px sidebar, WPRRT_Saved_Requests in wp_usermeta, AJAX wprrt_save/get/delete, auth.js preset dropdown.
nodes.norm_label: v1.3.0 saved requests and auth presets

nodes.label: v1.4.0 URL Params and cURL Export Plan
nodes.rationale: params.js parses {paramName} tokens; export.js builds clipboard curl from tab state.
nodes.norm_label: v1.4.0 url params and curl export plan

nodes.label: v1.5.0 Request History (Planned)
nodes.rationale: Last 50 requests in wp_usermeta wprrt_request_history; history.js sidebar tab with restore.

nodes.label: v2.0.0 Final Release Goals
nodes.rationale: Sparkline charts, Postman collection import/export, localization via wprrt_vars strings, virtual-scroll routes.

nodes.label: manage_options Capability Requirement
nodes.rationale: Administrators typically need manage_options to use Tools > REST Route Tester.

nodes.label: Role Switching for Permission Tests
nodes.rationale: Dropdown selects roles to test authenticated endpoint permissions.

nodes.label: 1.4.1 Hotfix Upgrade Notice
nodes.rationale: Recommended for users of role-based route testing after permission simulation fix.

nodes.label: Hotfix Ship Trigger Criteria
nodes.rationale: Ship 1.4.1 on fatal errors, broken sends, param regressions, bad cURL, or security issues post-1.4.0.

nodes.label: Fast Hotfix Response Workflow
nodes.rationale: Reproduce, minimal patch, npm run build if JS changed, smoke test routes/params/cURL, update readme.txt, publish.

nodes.label: Route Discovery Feature
nodes.rationale: Lists all registered REST routes with HTTP methods; filter by plugin or browse all.

nodes.label: Readable Route Patterns (Marketing)
nodes.rationale: Complex regex shown in friendlier form for quicker parameter selection.

nodes.label: No Public Endpoints Added
nodes.rationale: Testing uses admin-ajax with nonces; plugin does not expose new public REST routes.

nodes.label: Development and Staging Safety Notice
nodes.rationale: Can create temporary users for role tests and invoke arbitrary REST routes; caution on production.

nodes.label: Static Site Build-Free Design
nodes.rationale: Plain HTML/CSS/JS; python3 -m http.server 8080 for local preview; retheme via main.css :root variables.

nodes.label: rest_do_request Runtime Flow
nodes.rationale: Tests hit active REST server via rest_do_request() — no separate HTTP client.

nodes.label: wprrt_vars Localized Script
nodes.rationale: wp_localize_script exposes ajax_url and nonce for admin-ajax calls prefixed wprrt_.

nodes.label: No Public REST Routes for Testing
nodes.rationale: All server interaction from admin UI uses POST admin-ajax.php with wp_send_json_success/error envelope.
nodes.norm_label: no public rest routes for testing

nodes.label: wprrt_get_routes AJAX Action
nodes.rationale: Returns registered REST routes keyed by path with methods array and primary_method.

nodes.label: wprrt_get_user_roles AJAX Action
nodes.rationale: Returns role slugs and labels for dropdown plus empty key for default current user.

nodes.label: wprrt_test_route AJAX Action
nodes.rationale: Executes rest_do_request; requires manage_options; accepts route, method, headers, form, body, optional role for temporary user.

nodes.label: wprrt_vars JavaScript Object
nodes.rationale: Localized on wprrt-script handle with ajax_url and nonce (action wprrt_nonce).

nodes.label: WordPress admin-ajax.php
nodes.rationale: Transport layer for all plugin admin UI server calls.

nodes.label: manage_options Capability
nodes.rationale: Required for wprrt_test_route execution beyond logged-in AJAX context.

nodes.label: src/params.js Module
nodes.rationale: Parses {param} tokens, renders inputs, URL-encodes substitution at send time.

nodes.label: src/export.js Module
nodes.rationale: Builds and copies cURL command from current tab state to clipboard.

nodes.label: WPRRT_Saved_Requests PHP Class
nodes.rationale: Static save/get_all/delete against wp_usermeta key wprrt_saved_requests.

nodes.label: localStorage Tab State
nodes.rationale: Persists param values and auth type selection across tab sessions in the browser.

nodes.label: WP REST Route Tester — idle admin UI
nodes.norm_label: wp rest route tester — idle admin ui

nodes.label: WordPress admin sidebar with REST Tester menu
nodes.norm_label: wordpress admin sidebar with rest tester menu

nodes.label: Two-column layout (request form left, response right)
nodes.norm_label: two-column layout (request form left, response right)

nodes.label: Route input with placeholder Enter or select a route
nodes.norm_label: route input with placeholder enter or select a route
